title: MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: BRIGHTWAYS COUNSELING GROUP SALEM MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides individual counseling, medication management, Eye Movement Desensitization and Reprocessing (EMDR), cognitive behavioral therapy (CBT), dialectical behavioral therapy (DBT), parent child interactive therapy (PCIT), art therapy, and other services. 2555 Silverton Road NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 9:30am-5:30pm by appointment only Email (503) 943-0310 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 953-0310 Main phone (541) 527-4347 FAX Main phone (503) 943-0310 FAX (541) 527-4347 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website FEES: Varies. Accepts OHP and most major insurance companies. Sliding scale fees are available. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Community Mental Health Agencies Medication Information/Management Parent Child Interactive Therapy If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BRIGHTWAYS COUNSELING GROUP SALEM
